subject: Steps source-semantic v19d representative preflight
rights_scope: Research and test evidence only; no formal game release is authorized by this record.

systemic_change: The source-semantic content route is composited under the source-derived darkness/light visibility mask.
The final framebuffer remains a visibility oracle and is not used as HD geometry or sampling.
A visibility-bypass mutation is now a required rejected quality-leap regression.
